sqlMap.select: select * from OutsideInterestSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select ClientNameOsi, ClientIndustryOsiKey, ServiceIndustryOsiKey, ServiceRenderedOsiDate, PercentEquityInterestofOsi, CapacityServedByPersonnelOsi, AnnualFeesChargedOsi, EntityNameOsi, PositionHeldOsi, PercentEquityInterestOsi, DOInsuranceOsi, IndividualListedServicesOsi, OutsideInterestSuppKey, ClientIndustryOsiKeyOthers, ServiceIndustryOsiKeyOthers, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from OutsideInterestSupp where OutsideInterestSuppKey = #OutsideInterestSuppKey#
sqlMap.update:
update OutsideInterestSupp set
ClientNameOsi = #ClientNameOsi# ClientNameOsi = null ClientIndustryOsiKey = #ClientIndustryOsiKey# ClientIndustryOsiKey = null ServiceIndustryOsiKey = #ServiceIndustryOsiKey# ServiceIndustryOsiKey = null ServiceRenderedOsiDate = #ServiceRenderedOsiDate# ServiceRenderedOsiDate = null PercentEquityInterestofOsi = #PercentEquityInterestofOsi# PercentEquityInterestofOsi = null CapacityServedByPersonnelOsi = #CapacityServedByPersonnelOsi# CapacityServedByPersonnelOsi = null AnnualFeesChargedOsi = #AnnualFeesChargedOsi# AnnualFeesChargedOsi = null EntityNameOsi = #EntityNameOsi# EntityNameOsi = null PositionHeldOsi = #PositionHeldOsi# PositionHeldOsi = null PercentEquityInterestOsi = #PercentEquityInterestOsi# PercentEquityInterestOsi = null DOInsuranceOsi = #DOInsuranceOsi# DOInsuranceOsi = null IndividualListedServicesOsi = #IndividualListedServicesOsi# IndividualListedServicesOsi = null ClientIndustryOsiKeyOthers = #ClientIndustryOsiKeyOthers# ClientIndustryOsiKeyOthers = null ServiceIndustryOsiKeyOthers = #ServiceIndustryOsiKeyOthers# ServiceIndustryOsiKeyOthers = null VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# VersionSequence = null PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# PolicyKey = null
where OutsideInterestSuppKey = #OutsideInterestSuppKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from OutsideInterestSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select ClientNameOsi, ClientIndustryOsiKey, ServiceIndustryOsiKey, ServiceRenderedOsiDate, PercentEquityInterestofOsi, CapacityServedByPersonnelOsi, AnnualFeesChargedOsi, EntityNameOsi, PositionHeldOsi, PercentEquityInterestOsi, DOInsuranceOsi, IndividualListedServicesOsi, OutsideInterestSuppKey, ClientIndustryOsiKeyOthers, ServiceIndustryOsiKeyOthers, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from OutsideInterestSupp where OutsideInterestSuppKey = #OutsideInterestSuppKey#

select OutsideInterestSuppKey, ClientNameOsi, ClientIndustryOsiKey, ServiceIndustryOsiKey, ServiceRenderedOsiDate, PercentEquityInterestofOsi, CapacityServedByPersonnelOsi, AnnualFeesChargedOsi, EntityNameOsi, PositionHeldOsi, PercentEquityInterestOsi, DOInsuranceOsi, IndividualListedServicesOsi, ClientIndustryOsiKeyOthers, ServiceIndustryOsiKeyOthers from OutsideInterestSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
